rubric_id.description: Unique identifier for this rubric (e.g., TOOL_GROUNDEDNESS)

description.description: Human-readable description of what this rubric evaluates

scoring_scale.description: Defines the scoring scale for this rubric

aggregation_type.description: How to aggregate repeated judge outputs (median/mean for numeric, majority_vote for categorical)

requires_llm_judge.description: Whether this rubric requires LLM judge evaluation (false for deterministic rubrics)

evidence_selectors.description: JSONPath expressions to extract relevant data from NormalizedRun

scope.description: Whether this rubric evaluates individual turns or the entire run
